title: Company Settings
subtitle: Configure modules and data sharing for this company.
modules_subtitle: Enable available modules from your subscription for this company.
modules_empty: No modules available in your subscription. Contact an administrator.
sharing_subtitle: Share your data with other companies in the tenant.
sharing_direction_note: Sharing is one-directional: you share your data toward the destination company. For the destination to share back, it must configure its own sharing settings.
sharing_empty: No other active companies in this tenant.
sharing_no_common_modules: No common modules — enable the same modules in both companies to allow sharing.
read_only_notice: Only an administrator can modify these settings.
